About Us

Family-owned food truck serving up bold comfort food with a hot-off-the-griddle attitude. From stacked smash burgers to satisfying breakfast sandwiches, everything is made to feel familiar, filling, and full of flavor — simple food done right, with pride behind every order.

NJ's Newest Food Truck — Bold Comfort Food, Hot Off the Griddle

We believe great food doesn't need to be complicated. Just quality ingredients, real flavor, and a whole lot of heart on every plate that comes off our truck.

🚚

The Menu

Bold flavors. Honest portions. No compromises.

🍔 Burgers

All burgers served on a toasted brioche bun. Prices: Single / Double.

Classic Smashed Burger
Double stacked smashed patties w/ melted cheese topped with caramelized onions & house sauce
$12 / $14
Bacon Smashed Burger
Double stacked smashed patties w/ melted cheese, topped with crispy bacon, caramelized onions & house sauce
$14 / $16
Spicy Smashed Burger 🌶️
Double stacked smashed patties w/ melted cheese, thinly sliced jalapeños, & chipotle mayo sauce
$14 / $16
Double Smashed Burger
Four stacked smashed patties w/ extra cheese, crispy bacon, caramelized onions, & house sauce
$16 / $18

🌭 Hot Dogs & More

Classic Hot Dog
All beef hot dog, simple & delicious
$7 / $9
Loaded Dog
All beef hot dog w/ melted cheese, crispy bacon bits & caramelized onions
$9 / $11
Chicken Tendies
Golden home-style chicken tenders, fried to perfection
$10 / $12

🍟 Sides

French Fries
Golden, crispy fries
$5
Loaded Fries
Smothered w/ melted cheese, crispy bacon bits, & house sauce
$8

👧 Kids Menu

Ages 12 & under. Prices: Single / Combo.

Kids Smashed Burger
A perfectly sized smashed burger for the little ones
$7 / $9
Kids Classic Hot Dog
All beef hot dog, kid-approved
$5 / $7
Kids Chicken Tendies
Golden chicken tenders kids love
$7 / $9

🥤 Drinks

Bottled Water
$2

$3

$3

Where's the Truck?

Follow us on social media for daily locations!

📍

Daily Locations

We roll to a new spot every day! Check our social media pages for today's location and hours. We're always somewhere great — come find us.

📅

Weekly Schedule

Our weekly schedule drops every Sunday night. Follow us so you never miss out on your favorite smash burger. We're typically out Thursday through Sunday.

📞

Call Ahead

Big order? Running late? Give us a call at (609) 304-3014 and we'll have it ready when you pull up.

Get in Touch

Book us for your next event!

Let's Talk

Planning a party, corporate event, or community gathering? Cassidy's Kitchen brings the heat — literally. We cater events of all sizes with the same bold flavors you love from the truck.
